name: Southwest Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes (or red chili) to taste
Optional: 6 ounces reduced-fat or fat-free cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium to large pot over medium heat, toast the cumin until fragrant.
2. Add 3 cups tomato puree, onion, garlic, salt, pepper, red pepper flakes, and oregano.
3. Stir well and bring mixture to a simmer.
4. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 25 minutes.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients (beans, enchilada sauce, corn) and mix well.
6. Cook for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Divide pasta among serving dishes and top with the sauce.
8. Sprinkle cheese over each serving if desired.
9. Garnish with cilantro sprigs before serving.
